name: Guanajuato Silver Company Ltd.
description: Guanajuato Silver Company Ltd. is a growing precious metals producer operating multiple silver-gold mines in Mexico's historic Guanajuato mining district, with 480 years of mining history. The company runs the El Cubo and Valenciana mine complexes and the San Ignacio mine in Guanajuato, as well as the Topia mine in Durango, producing silver, gold, lead, and zinc concentrates. In 2026 the company expanded further with the acquisition of the Bolanitos gold and silver mine, ranking 10th on the TSXV Venture 50 list of top performing companies.
